title: World Cup 2026 Fixtures & Schedule API Input

source.title: Data source
source.description: Public data source to read. OpenFootball is public-domain JSON and currently the safest no-login source.

outputMode.title: Output mode
outputMode.description: Choose which records to write to the default dataset.

timezone.title: Viewer timezone
timezone.description: IANA timezone used to add a localTime field, e.g. UTC, Europe/Zagreb, America/New_York.

group.title: Group filter
group.description: Optional exact group filter, e.g. Group A.

team.title: Team filter
team.description: Optional partial team filter, e.g. Mexico, USA, Winner Group A.

city.title: City filter
city.description: Optional partial host city filter, e.g. Toronto, Mexico City, Atlanta.

stage.title: Stage filter
stage.description: Optional partial stage/round filter, e.g. Matchday 1, Round of 32, Final.

fromDate.title: From date
fromDate.description: Optional inclusive start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

toDate.title: To date
toDate.description: Optional inclusive end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

sortBy.title: Sort by
sortBy.description: Sort dataset rows by match number or kickoff datetime.

includeTbd.title: Include TBD/placeholders
includeTbd.description: Keep fixtures where one or both teams are TBD/placeholders. Useful before final draw/qualification is complete.

emitChangeSummary.title: Emit schedule change summary
emitChangeSummary.description: Compare current fixture hash to previous run and write a summary object to key-value store OUTPUT.

maxItems.title: Maximum dataset rows
maxItems.description: Optional cap for quick test runs. 0 means no cap.
